nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 5pm, then patchy fog. Partly sunny, with a high near 46. East wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

Mostly cloudy. Low around 46, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. South wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.
